title: Yolo Auth
description: A Auth/Login Plugin For Server Easy To Access Light Weight
body:
🎮 YoloAuth Plugin 🔐

A simple and secure login system for your Minecraft server!

✨ Features:

Premium Users: No need to log in—just join! 💎

Register & Login: Easy setup with /register and /login. 🔑

Save Password: Use /rpass to remember your login for 24 hours. 🕒

2FA Support: Extra security with email-based codes. 📧

Custom Spawn: Set spawn for login/register with /yoloregspawn. 🗺️

Admin Tools: Clear user data with /clearuserdata. 🧹
